2026-06-11TCCanada Marine ActAppointment of a director of the Montréal Port AuthorityAppointment of Eric Melis of Toronto, Ontario, to be a director of the Montréal Port Authority, to hold office for a term of two years, effective June 21, 2026.N/A
subject: Appointment of a director of the Montréal Port Authority
precis: Appointment of Eric Melis of Toronto, Ontario, to be a director of the Montréal Port Authority, to hold office for a term of two years, effective June 21, 2026.
